messages.text: Heads up, ADAS-208 is active. I pushed a rough first pass around camera-ingestion-service, but it is still definitely prototype code.
Latest branch has b4dd5695. The main symptom is still noisy on the rig, and the clean path only shows up when I replay the shorter clip pack.
steering oscillation starts only when the faster timing profile is enabled
Keep every commit tied back to ADAS-208. We are still in active development here, so I care more about narrowing the failure than polishing the code path.
Small ops note: if this touches steering-control-service, please leave enough breadcrumbs in logs or deployment metadata. Reconstructing the timeline from memory is getting old.
fwiw, diagnostics reports controller delta spikes without lane confidence collapsing. I do not think that is the whole story, but it keeps showing up in traces.
